title: CLTermRequest
description: Draft new term request for the Cell Ontology (CL). Produced when ontology-term-lookup finds no exact match. Includes both structured data and a pre-rendered markdown body matching the CL GitHub NTR issue template.

cell_type_label.description: The atlas cell type label that triggered this request.

suggested_label.description: Proposed CL term label, following CL naming conventions (lowercase, anatomical context where relevant).

definition.description: Proposed textual definition, 80-120 words, following CL definition guidelines. Starts with general classification, then distinguishing characteristics. Inline references in PMID:XXXXXX or DOI format.

parent_term.description: The immediate parent term (typically the broad match from CL mapping).

anatomical_location.description: Anatomical structure where this cell type is found (UBERON term).

logical_axioms.description: Proposed OWL subClassOf axioms using CL relations vocabulary.

synonyms.description: Suggested synonyms with scope and supporting reference.

references.description: Key references supporting the definition and axioms.

justification.description: Why this term is needed in CL — what gap it fills, how it relates to existing terms.

ntr_markdown.description: Pre-rendered markdown body matching the CL GitHub NTR issue template (docs/cl_new_term_request_template.md). Ready to paste into a GitHub issue.

relation.description: Relation label, e.g. 'part of', 'capable of', 'has plasma membrane part', 'expresses', 'develops from'.

relation_id.description: Relation CURIE from RO/BFO, e.g. BFO:0000050, RO:0002215.

filler.description: The object of the axiom — a term label.

filler_id.description: CURIE for the filler term, e.g. UBERON:0001003, GO:0008283.

notes.description: Optional clarification of why this axiom is included.

reference.description: Supporting reference for this synonym (PMID or DOI).

supports.description: What aspect of the term request this reference supports.
